hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Villa de Ocean blue SesokoClub in Motobu offers a three-bedroom villa with two bathrooms and a spacious living room. The property features a private pool, terrace, and garden, complemented by free WiFi.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can unwind in the indoor swimming pool, hot tub, and sauna. The villa includes air-conditioning, a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and free on-site private parking.
Prime Location: Located 81 km from Yoron Airport, the villa is a 4-minute walk from Anchihama Beach. Nearby attractions include Nakijin Gusuku Castle (10 km), Okinawa Churaumi Aquarium (9 km), and Busena Marine Park (27 km).
